description: Refactor the 'LogisticsSystem' project in Eclipse to improve the class hierarchy. The 'Transport' superclass currently contains tire-related logic that only belongs to the 'Truck' subclass, as Ships and Drones do not have tires. Relocate the 'checkTirePressure()' method and the 'MAX_TIRE_PSI' constant from 'Transport' to the 'Truck' subclass. Use automated refactoring to ensure all references and imports are updated and the project builds successfully.
